title: Soda Express
body:
# 1.19 version is no longer supported !

Soda Express: The mod that adds Sodas,

Welcome, in this mod, you will found some sodas but rename. Here's some example: Mine Cola = Coca Cola, Mepsi = Pepsi...

For this moment, the mod as:

-Can -Mine Cola -Mine Cola Light -Mine Cola Cherry -Mine Cola Vanilla -Mespi -Mepsi Vanilla -Monster Craft (Monster Energy) -Red Craft (Red Bull)

Sodas that can be added after:

-Mine Cola Zero Sugar (Coca Cola) ### Warning, the sodas can only be obtain in Creative ! The sodas can actually be drink !
